div1.entryFree: Chorus, interpreter in a dumb show or other play: whereupon it made this threne to the phoenix and the dove, as c. to their tragic scene, Phoen. 52. for the which supply, admit me c. to this history, Phoen. 52. this is one Lucianus, nephew to the king. You are as good as a c., my lord, Hml. III, 2, 255.
